overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Greek architecture. The character walks through a pottery workshop with smoking kilns, passes workers at tables, and approaches a grand residence with stone columns and blue banners, eventually ascending the stairs into the interior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: pottery kiln workshop with conical furnaces

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the pottery workshop among large kilns and wooden storage structures

entered.detail: tall conical pottery kiln with smoke rising from the top
rustic wooden structures supporting pottery storage
wooden shelves holding clay vessels and amphorae

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow pottery workshop area filled with smoking conical kilns and wooden storage racks. The path is dirt with sparse vegetation, and tall cypress trees are visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open workshop courtyard with market stalls

events.description: exiting the narrow kiln area into the open workshop courtyard

agents.ego_description: approaching NPC workers at the pottery tables in the open courtyard

notable_agents.action: male worker shaping pottery at a wooden table
female worker handling clay vessels near large storage jars

entered.detail: large ancient Greek residence with stone columns and blue banners
fabric shade structure supported by wooden poles
stall with canvas roof displaying goods
wooden workbench with pottery tools and clay

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit cobblestone courtyard where two NPC workers are busy at pottery tables. The main residence building becomes visible on the left with its stone facade, while market stalls with canvas canopies occupy the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand residence entrance with statues and banners

events.description: turning right to circle around the residence entrance area

agents.ego_description: circling around the front of the residence to approach the main entrance

entered.detail: large marble statue of a robed figure at the building entrance
vertical blue banner with golden emblem hanging from the building
wooden wagon with pottery jars parked near the wall
wide marble staircase leading up to the residence entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to circle around the front of the residence, revealing a grand entrance with a marble statue and blue banners. A wooden cart sits to the left, and the wide stone stairs leading into the building come into view ahead.

events.description: ascending the stone stairs into the residence courtyard
location name 'Hemippos's Residence' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs into the residence interior courtyard

notable_agents.action: guard standing at the top of the stairs near the entrance

entered.detail: tall marble columns supporting the residence portico
inner courtyard of the residence with upper level balconies
second floor balcony with wooden pergola roof

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide marble stairs into the residence, passing through a colonnade of stone columns. The sun backlights the entrance as the location name 'Hemippos's Residence' appears, revealing the interior courtyard with upper balconies and potted plants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rustic pottery workshop into the grand interior of a noble Greek residence. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt path lined with smoking conical kilns and wooden racks under a clear blue sky. As the path opens into a sunlit cobblestone courtyard, the camera passes workers at pottery tables and canvas market stalls before turning toward the stone facade of a large estate. The scene then shifts to reveal a grand entrance adorned with a marble statue and blue banners, circling past a wooden cart toward a set of wide stone stairs. Finally, the camera ascends the marble steps through a backlit colonnade, entering the interior courtyard of Hemippos's Residence to reveal upper balconies and potted plants.
